```python
def solve(*args):
    # Assuming the problem requires some form of processing on the input args
    # Here, we will implement a basic solution that returns the sum of the arguments
    # This is just a placeholder; the actual logic will depend on the problem statement
    
    if not args:
        return 0  # Return 0 if no arguments are provided
    
    return sum(args)  # Return the sum of the provided arguments
```
